verifyEmail.subject: Verify your email address
verifyEmail.heading: Verify your email address
verifyEmail.body: Click the button below to activate your account. This link expires in 24 hours.
verifyEmail.fallback: Or copy this link into your browser:
verifyEmail.footer: If you did not create this account, you can ignore this email.

resetPassword.subject: Reset your password
resetPassword.heading: Reset your password
resetPassword.body: Click the button below to choose a new password. This link expires in 1 hour.
resetPassword.fallback: Or copy this link into your browser:
resetPassword.footer: If you did not request a password reset, you can ignore this email.

magicLink.subject: Your sign-in link
magicLink.heading: Sign in
magicLink.body: Click the button below to sign in to your account. This link expires in 24 hours.
magicLink.fallback: Or copy this link into your browser:
magicLink.footer: If you did not request this link, you can safely ignore this email.

teamInvitation.heading: Join {orgName}
teamInvitation.fallback: Or copy this link into your browser:
teamInvitation.footer: If you were not expecting this invitation, you can ignore this email.

passwordChanged.subject: Your password was changed
passwordChanged.heading: Password updated
passwordChanged.body: Your account password was updated successfully.
passwordChanged.warning: If you did not expect this change, use the password reset flow right away.
passwordChanged.footer: If this was not you, reset your password immediately.
